ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Europe, UK, US) */,
  "size_chart" TEXT /* Size chart for the region (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Default currency for the region */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Default language for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "size_chart" TEXT /* Size chart for the product type in the region */,
  "size_chart_type" TEXT /* Type of size chart (e.g., numeric, alphanumeric) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the product price */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type (e.g., denim, tops, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency of the product price at the time of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was taken */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the product */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the product */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks for the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the analytics data is relevant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., English, Spanish, French) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)
